---
title: "Modelling of traffic collisions at road intersections in cape town, south africa: A bayesian spatio-temporal approach"
description: "Sebnem Er, Álvaro Briz-Redón, Sulaiman Salau, and Robin Lovelace (2025). Modelling of traffic collisions at road intersections in cape town, south africa: A bayesian spatio-temporal approach. *Applied Spatial Analysis and Policy*. https://doi.org/10.1007/s12061-025-09703-0"
date: "2025-07-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "er_modelling_traffic_2025"
citation-type: "article-journal"
citation-type-label: "Journal Article"
venue: "Applied Spatial Analysis and Policy"
doi: "10.1007/s12061-025-09703-0"
publication-url: "https://doi.org/10.1007/s12061-025-09703-0"
authors:
  - "Sebnem Er"
  - "Álvaro Briz-Redón"
  - "Sulaiman Salau"
  - "Robin Lovelace"
---

**Type:** Journal Article
**Venue:** Applied Spatial Analysis and Policy
**Year:** 2025

[DOI](https://doi.org/10.1007/s12061-025-09703-0) [URL](https://doi.org/10.1007/s12061-025-09703-0) [BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Citation

Sebnem Er, Álvaro Briz-Redón, Sulaiman Salau, and Robin Lovelace (2025). Modelling of traffic collisions at road intersections in cape town, south africa: A bayesian spatio-temporal approach. *Applied Spatial Analysis and Policy*. https://doi.org/10.1007/s12061-025-09703-0

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@article{er_modelling_traffic_2025,
  title = {Modelling of Traffic Collisions at Road Intersections in Cape Town, South Africa: A Bayesian Spatio-Temporal Approach},
  author = {Er, Sebnem and Briz-Redón, Álvaro and Salau, Sulaiman and Lovelace, Robin},
  date = {2025-07},
  journaltitle = {Applied Spatial Analysis and Policy},
  volume = {18},
  issn = {1874-4621},
  doi = {10.1007/s12061-025-09703-0},
  url = {https://doi.org/10.1007/s12061-025-09703-0},
  pages = {93},
  langid = {english}
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
